summary: Iteration 73: Tested P1 improvements - 4 new scrapers (HomeMax, Praktis, Bauhaus, Jysk), enhanced chat system with online status/typing/read receipts, subscription feature gating, and Projects page Ремонти/Строителство tabs. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified on desktop and mobile.
seed_data_creation: Created test user testuser10110@temadom.bg during registration test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 tested chat enhancements, scraper configs, and subscription plans. Chat page has new features: online status (green dot), typing indicator (bouncing dots), read receipts (CheckCheck icon), mobile responsive layout with back button. Projects page has Ремонти/Строителство tabs working. Subscription page shows all 3 plans with proper feature gating. Test user testuser10110@temadom.bg available for future tests.

backend_api_tests.categories_endpoint: GET /api/categories - PASS (21 categories with section field, 7 property types)

frontend_ui_tests.landing_page_mobile: PASS - Landing page loads on 390x844 with hamburger menu
frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login form works with data-testid selectors
frontend_ui_tests.projects_page_tabs: PASS - Ремонти/Строителство tabs visible and clickable
frontend_ui_tests.projects_construction_tab: PASS - Shows construction projects with property_type filter
frontend_ui_tests.chat_page_desktop: PASS - Two-column layout, sidebar with conversation list
frontend_ui_tests.chat_page_mobile: PASS - Single column layout, conversation list visible
frontend_ui_tests.subscriptions_page: PASS - Shows БАЗОВ/ПРО/PREMIUM plans with feature comparison

code_review_verifications.chat_page_features: Verified: online-indicator, typing indicator, read receipts (CheckCheck), mobileShowChat state, chat-back-btn data-testid
code_review_verifications.subscription_plans: Verified: БАЗОВ (15 EUR), ПРО (35 EUR), PREMIUM (75 EUR) with proper feature gating
